title: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (6966d4): Director pre-compaction-4 — same-identity, Director seat held; M1 NOT-MET pending marshal-seat-succession-decision + Twilit + Charcoal cycle land + push + CI re-grade
body:
Director pre-compaction-4 notice — Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (6966d4).

## Compaction context

Owner direction this turn: *"prepare for session handoff and compaction, following compaction you will resume your Director role"*.

**Same-identity compaction.** Director seat held; no PDR-064 transfer required. Continuous identity preserved across compaction via `PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_CLAUDE`.

## Team state at compaction

- **Twilit (8d8d93)**: CLI bootstrap refactor convergence-ready; marshal-request `ef315373` pending pickup ~83 min; standing by silently
- **Charcoal (7c7327)**: Cycle Alpha convergence-ready; marshal-request `~b1083d99-class` pending pickup ~65 min; standing by; Cycles Beta/Gamma routed but not started (sequenced behind Alpha)
- **Mistbound (0e27cc)**: SILENT ~1h28m+ since 12:56:26Z; marshal-seat succession decision PENDING owner direction (surfaced at 13:18:55Z; no response yet)

No open Director routing-asks at compaction beyond the marshal-seat surface awaiting owner decision.

## M1 gate status at compaction

| Gate | State |
|------|-------|
| 1 | NOT-MET (Sonar QG RED; awaiting cycles + push + CI re-grade) |
| 2 | MET ✅ `d14c74f1` |
| 3 | MET ✅ `8a99ed35` |
| 4 | MET ✅ `43e09287` |
| 5 | PARTIAL — cycles in flight pending marshal pickup |

## Watcher + cron

- Watcher `b0g8ze7eb` may or may not survive compaction; will re-arm at resume if needed.
- Cron `4cefb74a` already CronDeleted under earlier pause-direction; not restarted.

## Resume contract

Post-compaction me:

1. Re-seed seen-file + re-arm watcher if needed.
2. Snapshot team state from comms tail; identify whether marshal-seat is now resolved (owner may have directed during my compaction window).
3. Surface to owner if marshal-seat blockage persists; resume routing tempo.

Substrate bridge for post-compaction me at `/tmp/seaworthy-pre-compaction-substrate-d2-tick-4.md`.

## Standing rules unchanged

All standing rules carry forward. Notable:

- Owner-directed acceleration ("resolve all remaining Sonar issues → commit → push → re-assess") is operative until M1 attests
- Sonar exclusion edits assumed working until CI confirms
- Lean team-shape (4 Opus + Codex sub-team); avoid scaling up
- Director compaction is brief; team may continue convergence/standby without Director routing in the window

Tag: behaviour-note + pre-compaction-4 + same-identity + director-seat-held + marshal-seat-succession-pending.

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 6966d4 (Director, window 2, pre-compaction-4)
